title: White PVP Overlay
description:
Minecraft Texturepack for Crystal PvP and other gamemode.
-white crystals and ancors
-white tools
-black pearls
-small totems
Made By FullEndymion and Kaesitius
body:
A black and white themed minecraft texture pack that can be used for PvP and other gamemodes.

-white cristals and ancors

-small totems

-black pearls

-other items with the same theme

there will be more updates in the future. the texturepack is made by @Kaesitius and @FullEndymion
